channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Conference newcomers to play for titles in Power Four. Oregon-Penn St, Texas-Georgia top-5 matchups
item.description: The first season of major conference expansion has produced an intriguing set of championship games this week, and not only because they will determine which teams get automatic bids and first-round byes in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin suffers abdominal puncture wound but no bone or ligament damage in Killington crash
item.description: KILLINGTON, Vt. (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin suffered a deep puncture wound on the right side of her abdomen and “severe muscle trauma” during her scary crash in a giant slalom race on Saturday but no serious bone, ligament or organ damage.
item.dc:creator: PEGGY SHINN and PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Purdue fires coach Ryan Walters after going 5-19 in his two seasons
item.description: A historically poor season has led Purdue athletic director Mike Bobinski to fire coach Ryan Walters after just two seasons at the helm.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Girls soccer preview 2024-25: Rankings, storylines, players to watch, more
item.description: Bay Area girls soccer season preview: Why multiple local teams will be in contention for the area’s top spot.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Wisner has career day as No. 3 Texas advances to SEC title game with 17-7 win over No. 20 Texas A&M
item.description: COLLEGE STATION, Texas (AP) — The third-ranked Texas Longhorns are heading to the Southeastern Conference championship game in their first season in the league after knocking off No. 20 Texas A&M Saturday night in the renewal of a storied rivalry. Next up is a rematch with No.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders' Antonio Pierce says team 'heard a whistle' ahead of game-deciding botched snap in loss to Chiefs
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders looked to be in a prime position to upset their AFC West rivals on Friday, but a mistake in the game's final seconds proved costly.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, KTLA 5

item.title: Former Tennessee head coach Bill Battle dies at 82
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (WATE) -- Former University of Tennessee Coach William "Bill" Battle III died on Thanksgiving morning at the age of 82, according to the university.
item.dc:creator: Hope McAlee, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Depleted Jazz lose to Denver, 122-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Without injured stars Lauri Markkanen, John Collins and Jordan Clarkson, the Utah Jazz had little chance against the Denver Nuggets and lost for the sixth time in their last seven games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New York Jets hire 33rd team to assist in hiring process
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- An organizational shift is upon us for the New York Jets. Owner Woody Johnson has hired the 33rd team which was founded by former Jets GM Mike Tannenbaum in 2019, to help aid the Jets search.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Los Angeles area grad on life support after suffering head injury in college football game
item.description: A graduate of a Los Angeles County high school is on life support after suffering a serious head injury during a college football game last month. His school had mistakenly announced he had died Tuesday. According to KTLA affiliate WHNT in Huntsville, Alabama, 20-year-old Medrick Burnett Jr.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5
